title: Portable Indoor Air Quality Monitor
description: Handheld IoT device measuring CO₂, PM2.5, temperature, and RH. OLED display, MQTT logging, BLE smartphone display, USB-C charged.
constraints: 120×60×25 mm; < £50; USB-C; no user calibration required.
design_element_titles: SHT41 Digital Temperature and RH Sensing
Li-Po 3.7 V USB-C Rechargeable Battery Pack
